_comment: Attack-type mnemonics. Each entry is: attacker -> { defender: 'mnemonic string' }. Format: '[Attacker] can [verb] [defender]'

fighting.normal: Fighters beat up the Normal kid (high school brawl)

flying.fighting: Flying can stay out of Fighting's reach
flying.bug: Birds swoop down and eat Bugs

bug.psychic: Bug phobia breaks a Psychic's concentration

ghost.ghost: Only a Ghost can haunt another Ghost
ghost.psychic: Ghosts invade and shatter the Psychic mind

steel.fairy: Iron and steel trap Fairies (Celtic mythology)

grass.ground: Roots grow deep into the Ground

psychic.fighting: Mind over matter beats brute force
psychic.poison: Psychic foresight detects and avoids Poison

ice.ground: Permafrost freezes and cracks the Ground
ice.dragon: Even dragons can't survive a blizzard

dragon.dragon: Only a Dragon can match another Dragon

dark.ghost: Dark sorcerers command and banish Ghosts
dark.psychic: Fear of the Dark is every Psychic's weakness

poison_note: Note: Normal and Poison have no super-effective attacking matchups included here.
